code: import i18n from'i18next';export function parseGender(value){var genderConst=typeof value==='string'?parseInt(value,10):value;switch(genderConst){case 1:return i18n.t('male');case 2:return i18n.t('female');default:return'XX';}}export function formatNumber(value){return value.toString().replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g,",");}
